title: lantana ukambensis
intro: Lantana ukambensis, also known as Kalmegh or Amritha, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lantana ukambensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
